title: Multimodal AI Notes Platform (PWA)
description: Multimodal note-taking PWA with FastAPI and Supabase—text, audio, and image ingestion; Gemini parsing, pgvector semantic search, signed URLs, TTS summaries, deep-link sharing, and MCP integrations.

title: Regime-Aware Portfolio Optimization
description: Deep learning framework for portfolio construction and correlation optimization. Uses network-based representation learning to model market regimes and optimize asset allocations under varying risk scenarios.

title: DeepGLSTM: Drug-Target Binding Prediction
description: Graph-based Deep Learning model utilizing LSTM and Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) for predicting drug-target binding affinity (DTA) to assist in virtual screening and drug discovery pipelines.

title: Multi-Agent Simulation for Dealer Markets
description: Multi-agent simulation of dealer markets designed to model market-making behavior. Implements reinforcement learning algorithms for pricing, inventory management, and optimal hedging strategies.

title: Multi-Agent AI for Interactive Physics Simulations
description: Self-correcting multi-agent system for physics simulation code generation with sandbox execution and dependency management; expanded into a multimodal learning platform with context-aware chat and voice/image inputs.

title: HiringSight: AI Hiring Intelligence
description: Intelligent hiring platform leveraging AI pipelines to parse resumes, perform semantic matching, and provide data-driven insights for candidate evaluation.

title: Market Microstructure & Order Book Dynamics
description: Research and simulation project exploring limit order book dynamics, market microstructure noise, order flow toxicity (VPIN), and high-frequency trading simulation.

title: Adobe Behaviour Simulation Challenge — Gold
description: MLP + Transformer on BERT with SAM losses and PCA-based inference for tweet-like engagement prediction; supervised routing across three fine-tuned LLMs and CLIP for generation. Achieved 2262.33 RMSE on likes and outperformed GPT-4 on content metrics (0.24 BLEU, 0.25 ROUGE).

title: STAPLECAM — Endoscopic Segmentation
description: EM-based endoscopic segmentation integrating multiple CAM methods; ResNet-152 fine-tuning with cross-entropy and Otsu binarization on public endoscopy datasets.
